untranslatable_reason: The signal requires 'put_call_ratio' indicator which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Put/call ratio is an options market indicator not available in the price/volume/technical indicator set provided. Decile ranking (lowest and highest deciles) also requires cross-sectional ranking logic not expressible with the allowed operators and single-bar indicators.
translation_notes: Signal relies on options market data (put/call ratios) and cross-sectional decile ranking. The allowed indicator set contains only price, volume, and technical indicators. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to: (1) calculate put/call ratios from options data, (2) rank stocks into deciles, and (3) apply long/short positions accordingly. Expected returns: 40bps daily (t=24), 1% weekly (t=12). Stronger effect in small-cap stocks.
